# Magnetic Resonance Imaging

**Summary**: A non-destructive imaging technique used to monitor fluid distribution and saturation in porous media.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-ahmed|Ahmed, 2023]] used MRI to quantify oil saturation and pore size contribution to recovery in sandstone cores.

## Key Results and Findings

- The 2D FSE revealed piston-like oil displacement, with the best ultimate recovery of 53% achieved by the 4% GLDA system. ([[2023-ahmed|Ahmed, 2023, p. 161]])
